session_id: ag-claude-drives-nq (cold context switch from agent_gov P4 close)
class: doc-only gap-spec (operator-authorized this turn; names a referred policy gap — NOT standing-auth implementation)
slice: File NQ gap-spec for witness.position export-projection boundary mismatch
preceded_by: read-only constellation topology sweep (NQ ↔ Nightshift ↔ Wicket/WLP/Continuity) — topology report delivered to operator before this doc

topology_finding.produced: WitnessPosition on nq.witness.v1 WitnessPacket (nq-core/src/witness.rs:137) + PreflightResult.supports[] SupportingWitnessPacket
topology_finding.consumed_boundary: Nightshift ingests ONLY nq.finding_snapshot.v1 (nq findings export); does NOT ingest witness packets / preflight supports
topology_finding.consumer_state: Nightshift FULLY wired: NqExportDto.position -> translate_nq -> FindingSnapshot.position -> nq_peek render; no-inference sentinel (tests/witness_position_sentinel.rs) pins absence->'not testified', never a guessed lane
topology_finding.drop_point: NQ export: nq findings export does not project position onto nq.finding_snapshot.v1 -> dto.position always None -> consumer starved (renders 'not testified' for every real finding)

why_referred_not_standing_auth: Closing it is an attribution POLICY decision, not a wiring fix: a finding has plural supporting-witness custody (different positions possible), so a single finding-level scalar collapses plural custody into a badge (weak->strong laundering shape). Also: NQ core edit + nq.finding_snapshot.v1 schema/contract touch + invents policy — all three are fenced.

deliverable.doc: docs/working/gaps/WITNESS_POSITION_EXPORT_PROJECTION_GAP.md (status: candidate / referred to operator policy; no implementation authorized)
deliverable.index: registered in docs/working/gaps/README.md under Consumer contract
candidate_shapes_named_none_selected: (A) scalar FindingSnapshot.position — documented risk: badge/laundering, needs a collapse rule
(B) sorted-set FindingSnapshot.witness_positions — preserves plurality, loses per-witness attribution
(C) support-level FindingSnapshot.supporting_witnesses[].position — most faithful, largest export-shape change
deliverable.operator_lean_recorded_nonbinding: operator leans away from scalar (A) toward set (B) / preferably support-level (C): 'scalar position turns plural custody into a badge.' Recorded as input; doc selects nothing.

acceptance_met: durable handle exists + registered; states why referred/operator-policy not standing-auth; recommends candidate shapes without selecting; no projection/schema/export/Nightshift change; scalar-vs-set-vs-support-level NOT decided; support-level rendering NOT decided.
fences_honored: no projection implemented; no schema/export code touched; no Nightshift edit; no shape selected; no NQ core code change (doc + index only); no push.
